name: Portainer (Docker Cockpit)
description: A slick web UI to manage Docker itself — inspect containers, images, volumes and networks, tail logs and open a shell, all from the browser. The perfect companion for watching the services you deploy from the Floci Marketplace.

aws.parity: Manage the very containers locally that you will run as ECS tasks or EKS pods — same images, same compose topology.
aws.deploy: Push images to ECR and define the services as an ECS task definition or EKS deployment.

variables.label: HTTPS UI Port
variables.description: Host port for the Portainer web UI (served over HTTPS with a self-signed cert).
